name: Butterscotch Brownies#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt butter over low heat.
3. Add sugar, eggs, and flour to the melted butter, then stir in nuts, chocolate chips, and vanilla.
4. Grease an 8x8-inch pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared dish.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Cool in the pan and cut into squares.
